summary: Ran backend+frontend regression for premium Project OS scope: chat persistence/offline honesty, GitHub connector flows, snapshots, filesystem local-first pathing, workspace shell navigation, files explorer, memory hub, and kanban. All backend/API checks passed; one frontend kanban drag regression remains.

ui_bugs.issue: Dragging a task card from TODO to RUNNING does not move or persist status; task remains TODO.

integration_issues.issue: DnD interaction does not produce persisted status update in project data.

action_items: Fix Kanban drag/drop so dropping on RUNNING/DONE always triggers valid status update and persistence.
After fix, retest drag with both manual browser interaction and Playwright DnD flow.
critical_code_review_comments: Kanban drag path still does not persist state transition in UI workflow, while direct API status updates pass; issue is isolated to board drag interaction logic/event handling.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Chat_*, TEST_Snap_*, TEST_FS_* projects and related chat/files/snapshot/import artifacts during automated tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated on preview URL. GitHub PAT is connected (status badge PAT · smouj), repositories + preview load, attach import works, snapshot button creates new card, chat persists human+system offline messages, local-first files are written under /root/.kanclaw/workspace/projects/<slug>/. Repro project for kanban issue: test-fs-41c95c58, task title UI Drag Task RETEST remains TODO after drag.
rca of the issue: Repro: open /project/test-fs-41c95c58 -> Board -> create task -> drag task handle to RUNNING column. Result: card stays in TODO; API data confirms status TODO. Likely UI DnD destination resolution/drag event handling is not completing status transition in this interaction path.
